Name: FMovieSceneSubSequenceData
Description: Sub sequence data that is stored within an evaluation template as a backreference to the originating sequence, and section

Variables.Name: Sequence
Variables.Description: The sequence that the sub section references

Variables.Name: SequenceKeyObject
Variables.Description: The key object that the sub section uses. Usually either the sequence or the section.

Variables.Name: RootToSequenceTransform
Variables.Description: Transform that transforms a given time from the sequences outer space, to its authored space.

Variables.Name: SourceSequenceSignature
Variables.Description: Cached signature of the evaluation template

Variables.Name: DeterministicSequenceID
Variables.Description: This sequence's deterministic sequence ID. Used in editor to reduce the risk of collisions on recompilation

Variables.Name: PreRollRange
Variables.Description: The sequence preroll range considering the start offset

Variables.Name: PostRollRange
Variables.Description: The sequence postroll range considering the start offset

Variables.Name: HierarchicalBias
Variables.Description: The accumulated hierarchical bias of this sequence. Higher bias will take precedence
